title: ML Reading Notes
subtitle: Zhihu articles, surveys, and dense notes
summary: A long writing trail on adversarial examples, robustness, and interpretability, spanning public explainers, research maps, and paper notes.

blocks.text: When I was doing research with Prof. Xinggang Wang, I used to do weekly paper readings and wrote detailed notes over it. It spans across general computer vision, object detection, adversarial attacks and defenses. These notes were part of the research requirement but I also enjoyed it.
The link to the old blog is [here](https://greenere.github.io/blogs.html)
I wrote a list of zhihu articles with some readings:

items: [对抗样本问题——数据的一小步，模型的一大步](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/268154711)
[什么是对抗样本？——稳健性和泛化性的交集](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/269203978)
[对抗正则化——盲人摸象还是对症下药？](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/337880063)
